introSection: Kyubi Unchained is a roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Zamperla currently under construction at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. It will be based on the manga character Naruto.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster was seen testing by 10 November 2025.

fullText:
Kyubi Unchained is a roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Zamperla currently under construction at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. It will be based on the manga character Naruto.

The coaster was seen testing by 10 November 2025.
